rows.label: qev090405_MSG0001
rows.name:
Looks like you'll be working
with Boze Rose this time.
Good luck! Come home safe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0002
rows.name: Welcome back. How was the mission?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0003
rows.name:
Not half-bad, thanks to the fine
partner you scouted for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0004_m
rows.name:
With his help, we got Reggie
home safe and sound.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0004_f
rows.name:
With her help, we got Reggie
home safe and sound.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0005
rows.name: Am I hearing things?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0006
rows.name:
Every other recruit I paired you
with has come home in tears.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0007
rows.name:
They...usually get a little
overwhelmed from all the lectures.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_JNK0010
rows.name: Downplay

rows.label: qev090405_SEL0011
rows.name:
Claim that you have learned
much from Boze Rose.

rows.label: qev090405_JNK0020
rows.name: Brag

rows.label: qev090405_SEL0021
rows.name:
Assure Eleonora that you
are not like other BLADEs.

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0008
rows.name:
You see? Such humility is at the
heart of true Eastern philosophy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0009
rows.name:
I see potential in this one. That said,
there is still much work to do. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0010
rows.name:
If we'd met at the academy, I could
have trained you from the ground up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0011
rows.name: What a shame.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0012
rows.name:
But perhaps it's not too late. Why
don't we keep working together?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0013
rows.name:
I can help make you one of the true
BLADE elites! ...Well? What say you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_JNK0030
rows.name: Accept

rows.label: qev090405_SEL0031
rows.name:
Offer yourself to Boze
Rose as his pupil.

rows.label: qev090405_JNK0040
rows.name: Decline

rows.label: qev090405_SEL0041
rows.name:
Turn Boze Rose down in
no uncertain terms.

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0014
rows.name: Your answer pleases me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0015
rows.name:
In truth, I'd have taught you anyway.
This just saves me the trouble.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0016
rows.name:
Too late. It's already decided.
This is a thing that is happening![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0017_m
rows.name:
Now, let us start again as master
and pupil. I am Boze Rose Lowes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0017_f
rows.name:
Now, let us start again as master
and pupil. I am Boze Rose Lowes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0018
rows.name:
People call me the Avalancher Hammer, for
my fists pound any deviation straight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0019
rows.name:
From this moment on, you are
my pupil...and my friend.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev090405_MSG0020
rows.name:
Together, we'll craft a home
for humankind to rival Earth.
Now let's get started![ST:wait ]
